title: LauncherConfig
description: Configuration schema for the Trebuchet launcher.

entries.description: The list of launchable entries presented to the user.

steps.description: The ordered list of steps that can be executed by an entry.

title.description: The display title of the entry.

startStep.description: The zero-based index of the first step to execute for this entry.

step.description: A single executable step in a launch sequence.

stepMessage.description: The message displayed to the user while this step is running.

path.description: The relative or absolute path to the executable for this step.

startDelay.description: The delay in milliseconds before this step starts.

nextStep.description: The zero-based index of the next step to execute after this one completes. Omit on the final step.
